title: just a game to test your lQ
description:
You applied for a free IQ test on the Internet out of curiosity. On a quiet, dark night, 'World's Best IQ Test Specialist' comes to your house. You just have to solve a simple quiz. If you can. 







(This game is a horror game)



Objective

-Solve as many quizzes as you can while avoiding deliverymen, mannequin, and lunatic.

-Compete on the leaderboard by achieving high scores.
description_short: Wanna know about yourself better? Apply for a free lQ test provided by a Nobei Prize-winning doctor! The world's best experts will visit your house. You just need to solve a simple quiz.
